subject: wheel of cheese with a Miltank face icon stamped on its front, presented as a healing item
description: A circular wheel of pale yellow cheese is shown head-on, centered against a bright yellow radiating starburst background. The front of the wheel is stamped with a red circular emblem containing the silhouette of a Miltank face — the cow-like Pokemon — rendered as a simple cartoon mark. The cheese wheel has a slight three-dimensional rim and casts a soft shadow. Light rays beam outward from behind the wheel in alternating yellow tones, giving it a product-shot or branded-label feel. There are no figures or characters in the art — just the item presented as iconography.
foreground: wheel of cheese with red Miltank-face stamp
emotion: no figure; presentation is bright and inviting
